title: Seth's Better Armory
description: Enhances vanilla Minecraft by adding unique weapons to the game!
body:
### MOD FULLY COMPATIBLE WITH BETTER COMBAT

![Better Combat Compat](https://i.imgur.com/RG8bqpN.gif)

 

 

The Better Armory Mod aims to enhance Minecraft vanilla weapons by adding over 15 unique and fun swords to the game.

 

If you ever been tired like me of the minecraft sword system and wanted something more like an rpg with a vanilla touch, then this is your mod!

The swords of this mod are fun and equally balanced to play and obtain, making you to explore, combat, fish and even trade.

 

AVARITIA:

 ![Avaritia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac1b7fd0adac7a0fa3c0eb92095417d12ec9a317.png)

-Obtaining: Trading with a weaponsmith.

-Ability/Atribute: On kill there's a chance to get one emerald.

 



TIDANIR:

![Tidanir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7b21204c420b522197b550ce1262e356222aab1.png)

 

-Obtaining: Killing an Elder Guardian

-Ability/Atribute: On hand makes you able to breathe underwater.

 



 

RADIANCE:

![Radiance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ad511c3ef07c6dd74581dd52b69167c205055d7.png)

 

-Obtaining: Crafting with the torchflower

-Ability/Atribute: On hit makes the target glow and gives you haste for a period of time.

 



 

ICICLE:

![Icicle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4efb88badf39eb330cedc8da87808207893dc63f.png)

 

-Obtaining: Finding the chest from the Icy Pillars

-Ability/Atribute: On hit freezes the target making them slower.

 



 

SWORDFISH:

![SwordFish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3838458c3e8592811b67634169d74b2409d57653.png)

 

-Obtaining: Fishing

-Ability/Atribute: On hit makes you swim faster.

 



 


Those were only 5 of the current swords, the mod also adds 4 new structures over the overworld and nether, making finding swords more challenging and fun. 

 

If you find any bug or problem please share it on the comments or send me a message. You can also suggest weapon reworks! In the future maybe i will add more swords, if you have an idea of a cool sword or weapon, just let me know!

 

For now there's only the Forge version, i will work on a fabric version if requested.

 

Btw sorry if my english sucks, it's not my native lenguage.

 [CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-armory-mod)

 [Twiter](https://x.com/Seth0_G)

 [MCreator Page](https://mcreator.net/modification/108841/seths-better-armory)
